Monday.JP: Run 1.5–2 miles (CAP training). Warm-up 5 min easy pace, 18 min main effort, cool-down 5 min walk.
Monday.Joseph: Run 1–1.5 miles (CAP training). Warm-up 5 min easy pace, 18 min main effort, cool-down 5 min walk.
Monday.Lauren: Run/walk intervals 0.75–1 mile (ankle loading & core engagement). Warm-up, 18 min, cool-down.
Monday.Michael: Bike or scoot alongside the family for the full run.

Wednesday.Lauren: Goblet squats, push-ups, planks, bird dogs. 25–30 min total.
Wednesday.James: Join the family game & relay activities.

Friday.JP: Strength + conditioning day. Warm-up: 5 min easy jog + dynamic stretches. Main set (4 rounds): 15 push-ups, 20 air squats, 12 lunges per leg, 8 pull-ups (or inverted rows), 30-sec plank. Rest 60 sec between rounds. Finisher: 5 min easy jog. Cool-down: 5 min stretching.
Friday.Joseph: Strength + mobility day. Warm-up: 5 min easy jog or jumping jacks. Main set (3 rounds): 10 push-ups, 15 air squats, 10 lunges per leg, 20-sec plank, 10 sit-ups. Rest 60 sec between rounds. Cool-down: 5 min stretching (hamstrings, calves, shoulders).
Friday.Lauren: Postpartum strength + mobility. Warm-up: 5 min walk + gentle hip circles. Main set (3 rounds): 10 goblet squats (light), 8 incline push-ups, 10 bird dogs per side, 20-sec dead bug hold per side, 10 glute bridges. Rest 45–60 sec between rounds. Cool-down: 5 min stretching (hips, hamstrings, shoulders). Stop and rest if anything pulls in the core or pelvic floor.
Friday.Michael: Family movement game. 20–25 min of active play: tag, obstacle course in the yard, animal walks (bear crawl, crab walk, frog hops), or jumping practice. Goal is fun + foundational coordination.
Friday.James: Tummy time + crawling play, 10–15 min. Stack-and-knock-over with soft blocks, push toy practice, or supported standing at low surface. Join the family movement game in stroller or playpen.
